response: Dedicated Medical Transcriptionist and Scribe with over 15 years of experience, I offer expert knowledge of medical terminologies across specialties including Orthopedics, Cardiology, and Neurology. My background includes supervising teams, ensuring high-quality editing, and managing customer relationships while consistently exceeding productivity targets. Proficient in EMR platforms such as eClinicalWorks and Experity, I maintain exceptional accuracy and strict adherence to turnaround times. I bring strong leadership skills, a passion for continuous learning, and a proven track record of contributing to organizational success. With a typing speed of 70–80 words per minute and expertise in quality assurance, I am ready to deliver precise documentation. My diverse experience spans from quality analysis to team supervision, ensuring efficient workflow and superior service. I am eager to leverage my extensive skills to support your healthcare team and enhance operational excellence.
